description: A user reports they are unable to open their QuickBooks company file, which is hosted on a server.

nodes.task_description: Verify the user can ping the QuickBooks server.

expected_outcome.value: The server is reachable on the network.

nodes.task_description: Check the QuickBooks Database Server Manager service on the server.

expected_outcome.value: Technician finds the service has stopped.

nodes.task_description: Restart the QuickBooks Database Server Manager service.

expected_outcome.value: The user is now able to open the company file successfully.
